titleStmt.title: SII 11.211: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 211. (A.R. No. 456 of 1926.) MUGAD, DHARWAR TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT. ON A SLAB SET UP ON THE TANK-BUND.

summary.p: This inscription refers itself to the reign of Tribhuvanamalladēva; but bears no date and records no gift. It gives in verse the genealogy of Nākarasa who was descended from Chāvuṇḍarāya, the Nārgāvuṇḍa of Mugunda Thirty, a sub-division of Mahārājavāḍi-nāḍu in Palasige Twelve-Thousand. The record mentions the Mahāmaṇḍaḷēśvara Tribhuvanamalla Gūvaladēva of the Kadaṁba lineage as governing Palasige Twelve-Thousand and Koṅkaṇa Nine-Hundred. Gūvaladēva and Nākarasa of this record are apparently the same Gūvaladēva and Nākarasa of A.R. No. 458 of 1926, (No. 177, above).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© namastuṁga siraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē traiḷōkyanagarāraṁbhaṁ mūḷastaṁbhāya saṁbhavē . svasti samasta
bhuvanāśrayaṁ śrīprithvīvallabhaṁ mahārājādhirājaṁ . paramēśvaraṁ paramabhaṭṭāraka satyāsra
yakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmatribhuvanamalladēvara vijayarājya mutta
rōttarābhivridhipravarddhamāna mācaṁdrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ saluttamire tatpādapadmōpajī
vi samadhigatapañcamahāsabda mahāmaṇḍaḷēsvaraṁ banavāsipuravarādhīsvaraṁ cāga
caturbhbhujaṁ suvarṇnagaruḍadhvajaṁ dharaṇīrudradēvatāprasūtānvaya samu
dharaṇakadembānvaya saptakōṭēśvaradēvalabdhavaraprasāda kastorikāmōda mū
rttinārāyaṇa kīrttimārtta(ṁ)ṇḍa tyāgesiṁhāsana kadaṁbakaṇṭhīravaṁ nāmādipra
sastiśahita śrīmanmahāmaṇḍaḷēśvaraṁ tribhuvanamallaṁ gūvaladēvaru pala
sige pannircchāsiramumaṁ koṁkaṇa Oṁbhainūṟumaṁ duṣṭanigrahasiṣṭapratipā
ḷanarāgi sukhasaṁkathāvinōdadiṁ rājyaṁ geyyuttamire . palasige pannircchāsira
doḷage mahārājavāḍi nāḍeṁbudu bhūlalanālapana madakkaṁ tiḷakaveni
ppudu muguṁda mūvatteṁduṁ . Ā mūvattakkaṁ mattī mēdini pogaḷe negardde nārggā
vuṇḍaṁ cāvuṇḍarāyaneṁbaṁ śrīmahimakaraṇḍa nenisi jasamaṁ taḷede . Ācā
vuṇḍana kulavadhu vācāravisuddhe sakaḷadharmmapriyeyādā caṭṭiyakkanesedaḷu
bhūlōkaṁ pogaḷe tanna guṇagaṇadoḷpa . Ā yirvvargaṁ puṭṭida nāyatabhujavikramaṁ parā
kradoḷaṁ saśrīyoḷa madhikanu menipa najēyaṁ śrīnāgadēvaneṁba mahātma . Ātana kulavadhu gauri
ge sītage rugmiṇige mikka guṇamatiyaṁbī mātasaye polliyakkaṁ khyāti mahāsatiya riṁda vegga
ḷa vādaḷu . Avarirvvarga manēkapuṇyadodavuṁ peṁpuṁ manōrāga dutsavamuṁ kī
rttiyu martiyuṁ manujarūpākāradiṁ puṭṭuva(ṁ)ntavolaṁ teyde muguṁda nāḍesavinaṁ
sāmantamārttaṇḍa nī bhuvanaṁ baṇnise puṭṭidaṁ jananutaṁ sāmantavidyādhara . madavadvairi
ya naṭṭi koṁdu saraṇeṁdudbhītaraṁ kādu bēḍida nānāvidhayācakargge siriyaṁ sālva (ṁ)nnegaṁ mā
ḍi yaggada kīrttaṁgane lōka delleḍegaḷoḷ gaṁgāṁganākārasaṁpadavaṁ tāḷdire peṁpuvettu desakaṁ sāmantamārttaṇḍana .
Ene rūḍivetta mārttaṇḍana vallabhe lōkajanani yeṁbī nāmaṁ tanagāge sakaḷa bāṁ
dhavajanacintāmaṇi yidenisi gojjiyakkaṁ negarddaḷ . sogayipa visvalōka dadhidēvate
yāda negartteyadrijātege pesarvvetta bhāratige sōbhipa lakṣmige maimevetta sītege paripūThis letter is written above the
rṇnabhāgyavati tānenisalu neṟedirdda gojjikabbege nutakāminījanapavitrege pēḷdo
re matta māvaḷō . vanitātiḷakege kāntājanasēbyege kāminīpavitrege mārttaṇḍana
satige gojjikabbege vinayāṁbhōnidhige puṇyanidhi geṇe yāvaḷ . Enisida mārttaṇḍaṁ gaṁ
vanitōttame negardda gojjikabbegaṁ vudiyisidaṁ taneyaṁ nutacitabhōgyaṁ ja
niyisuvavo livargge maimeyiṁ nākarasa . Ātana vivēkavrittiya nāta
na rūpātisayama nātana guṇamaṁ mātēno pogaḷa lupamātīta mena lnāka
ṇaṁge manuja rddoreye .
Digital edition of SII 11.211 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
